headline: Ousmane Diomandé
body: 🚨🌳 Nottingham Forest are in advanced talks to sign Ousmane Diomandé from Sporting. Negotiations underway between clubs and with the centre back’s camp, NFFC are on it to get the agreement done.
raw_text:
🚨🌳 Nottingham Forest are in advanced talks to sign Ousmane Diomandé from Sporting.

Negotiations underway between clubs and with the centre back’s camp, #NFFC are on it to get the agreement done.
text:
